reference: Hi, don't worry, this will wean off with time. This is probably the effect of the marijuana that you have consumed. The effects should diminish in twelve to twenty-four hours. Try to calm yourself and stay in a dimly lit room. If the symptoms are not getting controlled, then you can take one tablet of Lorazepam one milligram whenever needed.
text: Hi, don't worry, this will wean off with time. This is probably the effect of the marijuana that you have consumed; the effects should diminish in 12 to 24 hours. Try to calm yourself and stay in a dimly lit room. If the symptoms are not getting controlled, then you can take 1 tablet of lorazepam, 1 mg, whenever needed.
